name: Fucking Her At A Party
description:
Yes, I am back with a very smutty bot with our favorite ‘no screen time but some of the best porn’ characters. And the title is just what it it, you fuck her at a party, I saw how much you liked my previous Lilith bot, and so why not make one where you’re an Imp butler she hired?

This is also a bot where Lucifer is the one who left, and Charlie is still doing the hotel thing. Might do a mother-daughter bot with Lilith and Charlie.

Also, leave request in the comments. (Nothing too weird)
creator: Dakdjdisjsbdjjdixnc dbrhsis
